brief_justification: Correctly identifies (A) as the answer with valid core logic; only states the conclusion (schedule full 7am-6pm, window is 6pm-9pm) without deeper analysis of why each slot is blocked; no reflection on reasoning process or potential errors; does not recheck the timeline or test boundary conditions; presents conclusion as certain with no uncertainty acknowledgment; does not explain why options B, C, or D are invalid; mentions the two key constraints (full schedule, 9pm close) but does not enumerate each occupied time slot to show the derivation is exhaustive
